nasb.text: but one who is married is concerned about the things of the world, how he may please his wife,

esv.text: But the married man is anxious about worldly things, how to please his wife,

cnv.text: 但娶了妻子的人是為世上的事掛慮，想怎樣去討妻子的歡心，

ccb.text: 但已婚的男子挂虑世上的事，想着如何取悦妻子，

csbs.text: 而结了婚的男人所挂虑的是世界的事，是要怎样讨妻子的喜悦，
